title: HEKU High-Quality Silver Decorative Sand (Approx. 750 g) fine Grain (0.1-0.5 mm) resealable tin, Versatile for Decoration and Crafts, Silver
features: High quality: the Heku decorative sand is a coloured sand with a very fine grain size of 0.1 - 0.5 mm, which is ideal for various decorations and crafts.
Practical packaging: the decorative sand is delivered in a practical cylinder tin with screw cap. This resealable tin allows for easy storage and reuse.
Versatile: this decorative sand is ideal for embellishing glass containers, lanterns and many other decorative items.
ATTRACTIVE COLOR: The sand comes in an elegant silver colour that adds a touch of sophistication and shine to any decorative object.
Enough quantity: with 750 g decorative sand, you have enough material for numerous decorations and craft projects.
description: From the manufacturer About us: HEKU is a marketing and sales company with a focus on paper goods and consumer goods as well as everyday items. HEKU looks back on a company history that has been over 30 years. The company is founded by Helmut Kusch in Mainz. The company HEKU combines 20 product groups and product ranges under one roof. Over 2,000 items from production facilities are merged under the HEKU brand and delivered to the retailer. Our customers include classic food retail, retail chains, construction, beverage and post markets, as well as non-species companies that expand their existing range with HEKU products. HEKU's corporate philosophy is the conceptual extension of the individual product groups. With numerous ranges and many product groups, our product range ranges from gift wrapping items and table and party decoration to various practical household items that simplify everyday life. Large quantity: With 750 g sand, you have enough material for numerous decorations and craft projects. GRAINING The Heku decorative sand is a coloured sand with a very fine grain size of 0.1 - 0.5 mm, which is ideal for various decorations and crafts. Versatile: This decorative sand is ideal for embellishing glass containers, lanterns and many other decorative items.
